title: Salvage Furnace
description: Did you forget that you already made a diamond pickaxe? Was that the worst possible enchant to get on a Chestplate? Do you have a mobfarm that generates more tools and armor pieces that you can use? Than this is the mod for you!
body:
![Salvage Furnace](https://i.postimg.cc/pTPz828d/logosmall-done.png)

 
# Mod Info!

Patchouli is highly recommended.
Compatibility with Mortius' Weaponry!
Did you forget that you already made a diamond pickaxe?
Was that the worst possible enchant to get on a Chestplate?
Do you have a mobfarm that generates more tools and armor pieces that you can use?
Do you wish you could recycle these items more efficiently than putting them in a blast furnace?
Than this is the mod for you!

 
# Salvage Furnaces!

![Salvage Furnaces](https://i.postimg.cc/pdnHYpTm/Salvage-Furnaces2.png)
 
This mod adds several different salvage furnaces, one for each different type of material.
You can use these furnaces to recycle various tools and armor pieces and recover some of the materials.
The higher the durability of the item the more scraps you can recover.
Some items like shovels can't be recycled when it is too damaged.

 
When you recycle tools in the salvage furnace, you receive some scrap.
The more material that was used to craft the original item the more scrap you will receive.

 

![Diamond_salvage_furnace_gif](https://media.giphy.com/media/bqQIfxTJipogWe24Eu/giphy.gif)
 
You can smelt the scraps to recycle the material.

 

![Smelting](https://i.postimg.cc/GtdsnnG6/Smelting-Recipe.png)
 
# Enchanted scrap! 
When you recycle enchanted tools in the salvage furnace, you receive some enchanted scrap.
You can smelt enchanted scraps to get enchanted materials.
These enchanted materials can be used to make tools. You can also smelt the enchanted material to make it lose its magical properties and to recover some experience that was used to enchant the original item.

 
![Smelting2](https://i.postimg.cc/VLD1RP65/Smelting-Recipe-2.png)
 
You can also use these enchanted materials to craft a block. It can be used for decorative purpoces or to save inventory space. 

 

![Block of enchanted material](https://i.postimg.cc/RFwYTsm4/Block-Of-Enchanted-Diamond.png)
 
Because of its enchanted capabilities, it can also be used near an enchanting table to enhance enchanting or be used as a beacon base. 

 

![Enchanting](https://i.postimg.cc/Y91FRVSr/Enchanting.png)

![Beacon-Base](https://i.postimg.cc/Y91FRVSr/Enchanting.png)

 
 
# Tools! 
Tools made from enchanted materials behave like their mundane counterpart.
They have the same durability, damage, attack, speed, efficiency and harvest level, but they have a higher enchantability rate.
The higher the enchantability, the better enchantments you will get when enchanting the tool.
 

![Tools](https://i.postimg.cc/CM96pvQJ/Tools.png)
 
# Armor!
The enchanted materials can also be used to craft armor. It has the same durability, damage absorbs, toughness and knockback resistance as their mundane counterparts, but it has a higher enchantability rate. The higher the enchantability, the better enchantments you will get when enchanting the armor piece.

 
![Armor](https://i.postimg.cc/1tCBXgVF/Armor-2.png)
 
# Netherite! 
![Netherite_Salvage_furnace](https://i.postimg.cc/DwNhXq2V/Netherite-Salvage-Furnace2.png)
 
When you salvage enchanted netherite tools or armor you receive some enchanted netherite scrap. You can use this enchanted netherite scrap with some enchanted gold to craft some enchanted netherite. This enchanted netherite can be used to upgrade diamond tools (e).

 

![Enchanted_Netherite_Ignot](https://i.postimg.cc/t7GyF4gc/Enchanted-Netherite-Ignot.png)

 
Add some enchanted netherite with some diamond tools (e) in the smithing table to create some netherite tools (e).

 

![Enchanted_Netherite_Tools](https://i.postimg.cc/nrFhC13W/Enchanted-Netherite-Tools.png)
 
You can also add some enchanted netherite with some diamond armor (e) in the smithing table to create some netherite armor (e).

 

![Netherite-Armor](https://i.postimg.cc/k58ZZvZ5/Netherite-Armor.png)

 
# Upgrades! 
The salvage furnaces have an upgrade system. The upgrades can be made out of different materials. There are three kinds of blank upgrades. An Iron upgrade, a gold upgrade and a diamond upgrade. The iron one can be used to craft Fuel efficiency upgrades, the gold one can be used to make speed upgrades and the diamond one can be used to make a storage upgrade.

 

 ![Upgrade-System](https://i.postimg.cc/mDhzN4wx/Upgrade-System-2.png)

 
Fuel upgrades can be inserted into a salvage furnace to upgrade the machine. This will make it so the machine burns fuel more efficiently. A salvage furnace can take up to 10 fuel upgrades.

 

![Fuel-upgrade](https://i.postimg.cc/Jz6w2NQz/Fuel-upgrade.png)

 
Speed upgrades can be inserted into a salvage furnace to upgrade the machine. This will make it so the machine smelts items faster. A salvage furnace can take up to 10 speed upgrades.

 

![Speed-upgrade](https://i.postimg.cc/DzpGjw0X/Speed-upgrade.png)

 
The storage upgrade will place a salvage storage above the machine if the space is available. The storage will automatically place any items that the furnace below can salvage in the inventory of that furnace and it will put the output back in the storage.

 

![Storage_Upgrade](https://i.postimg.cc/JhMRmYZD/Storage-upgrade.png)
 
# Sigils and Runes! 
When a salvage furnace has been upgraded with one or more of the available upgrades a reward bar will appear in the GUI of the furnace. When the bar is full the player will receive a repair sigil of that salvage furnace type. This sigil can be used to craft repair runes.

 

![Repair-Sigils](https://i.postimg.cc/fLF38P2V/Sigils-Repair-2.png)

 
Repair runes can be used to repair your armor, tools and weapons. Place one or more repair runes in your inventory and watch it repair your equipment. It will repair your armor and the tool you are carrying in your main hand.

 

![Repair-Rune](https://i.postimg.cc/kGb2zyzf/Repair-Runes-2.png)

 
# Advancements! 

![Advancements](https://i.postimg.cc/brGy1fgw/Advancements.png)

![Advancements-Expert](https://i.postimg.cc/x8qPr0CP/Advancements-Expert.png)
 
# Changelog!

Salvage Furnaces 1.10

    Crafting Salvage Furnaces no longer requires the previous tier furnace as an ingredient.

    Added full compatibility with Spartan Weaponry, allowing its weapons and gear to be salvaged or repaired within the Salvage Furnaces.

 Salvage Furnaces 1.9.1

    Fixed an issue where certain Netherite items were not correctly transferred from storage to the furnace.
    Armor (e) now features the same glow effect as the tools, ensuring a consistent visual style.
    Gold (e) armor now prevents Piglins from attacking the player, similar to standard gold armor.
    Netherite (e) armor is now fireproof, meaning it will not be destroyed if dropped into lava.

 Salvage Furnaces 1.9

    Added Compatibility with Mortius' Weaponry
    Fixed a problem with the Patchouli books (1.20.1)
    Changed Netherite recipes in the smithing table (1.20.1)

 Salvage Furnaces 1.8.1

    Furnace consumed bucket when using a bucket of lava als fuel
    Fixed wrong info showed as variables in gui (1.19.4 and 1.20.1)

Salvage Furnaces 1.8

    Changed textures: Repair runes

Salvage Furnaces 1.7

    Added Wooden Repair Rune
    Added tooltips on the repair runes
    You can now salvage horse armor
    Show horse armor in furnace and storage
    Added starter advancements for wooden rune
    Added enchanted armor
    Added enchanted materials Block
    Enchanted materials can be used as a beacon block base
    Added Expert Advancements
    Texture changes
    Bugfix advancements could not be earned when the scraps were in the store

Salvage Furnaces 1.6

    Disabled taking from different slots to optimize automation.
    Disabled inserting into different slots to optimize automation.
    Different blocks will show examples of what you can use in that block.
    Added a reward system in the different salvage furnaces.
    Added repair sigils and repair runes.

Salvage Furnaces 1.5

    Added storage upgrades functionality

Salvage Furnaces 1.4

    Changed upgrade system input slots (They overlapped with JEI)
    Added 1.16.5 compatibility
    Added 1.18.2 compatibility

Salvage Furnaces 1.3

    Added machine upgrade system
    Added fuel upgrades
    Added speed upgrades

 Salvage Furnaces 1.2

    Advancements rework

 Salvage Furnaces 1.1

    Added Netherite salvage furnace
    Added Netherite Scrap (e)
    Added Netherite Tools (e)
    Added new advancements
    Small bugfixes

# Compatibility with Mortius' Weaponry!
We're thrilled to announce that the Salvage Furnace mod now fully supports salvaging and repairing items from the Mortius' Weaponry mod! Dive into a more immersive experience as you can now reclaim resources and repair the unique weapons crafted in Mortius' arsenal. Whether it's a diamond dagger or a gladius, our repair runes and salvage furnaces have got you covered. Enhance your Minecraft adventures by combining the art of smithing and combat with this latest update.
 
# Patchouli support! 
This mod has full Patchouli support.
While it is not needed to play the mod it is highly recommended.
 

![Patchouli support](https://i.postimg.cc/XJq5qsbj/Patchouli-Support-2.png)
 
 
# Mod usage! 
Do NOT:

    Re-upload the mod
    Claim ownership of this mod

 
DO:

    You can share the location link of the mod
    Report problems
    Give feedback
    Use this mod in modpacks
    Make videos of this mod

 
# Creators! 
Kentime (Project Blue)

 
Thank you for reviewing the mod and have a good day!
